hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比表示通胀过高；威廉姆斯认为价格压力有所缓解；【FINANCE】贝莱德高管表示，债券 ETF 流量激增，寻求收益：“市场正在嗅出一些东西”；【AI】新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境。

items.title: Chicago Fed President Goolsbee says inflation is too high; Williams sees price pressures easing
items.summary: In a live CNBC interview from his home district, Goolsbee declined to speculate on where he thinks interest rates are headed.
items.title_zh: 芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比表示通胀过高；威廉姆斯认为价格压力有所缓解
items.summary_zh: 在他的家乡接受 CNBC 现场采访时，古尔斯比拒绝猜测他认为利率的走向。

items.title: Bond ETF flows surge in hunt for yield: 'Market sniffing out something here,' says BlackRock exec
items.summary: Bond investors are abandoning aggregate benchmarks in favor of a broad mix of fixed-income investments to maximize yield with the stock market on edge.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德高管表示，债券 ETF 流量激增，寻求收益：“市场正在嗅出一些东西”
items.summary_zh: 债券投资者正在放弃总体基准，转而选择广泛的固定收益投资组合，以在股市紧张的情况下实现收益最大化。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.

items.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
items.summary: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通宣布500亿美元回购 高盛在美联储压力测试后提高股息
items.summary_zh: 这些公告是在美联储发布年度压力测试之后发布的，该测试发现所有 32 家大型银行都经受住了假设的衰退。

items.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
items.summary: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.
items.title_zh: 美联储称美国银行可承受资本规则改革期间7080亿美元的损失
items.summary_zh: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.

items.title: BlackBerry is making a massive comeback as an 'uncrashable' software layer for AI and robotics
items.summary: BlackBerry's stock is surging after the company's massive earnings beat and is pivoting into becoming a critical component of the AI and robotics boom.
items.title_zh: 黑莓作为人工智能和机器人“坚不可摧”的软件层正在大规模卷土重来
items.summary_zh: 黑莓公司的盈利大幅增长后，该公司的股价正在飙升，并正在成为人工智能和机器人热潮的重要组成部分。

items.title: Sharplink buys Ethereum for first time in 8 months, adding 5,000 ETH: onchain analyst
items.summary: The buy came days after a group of former Ethereum Foundation researchers launched Ethlabs, a nonprofit Sharplink helped fund.
items.title_zh: Sharplink 8 个月来首次购买以太坊，增加 5,000 ETH：链上分析师
items.summary_zh: 此次收购是在一群前以太坊基金会研究人员推出 Ethlabs 几天后进行的，Ethlabs 是 Sharplink 资助的一个非营利组织。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.

items.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
items.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.
items.title_zh: 在与共和党关系紧张后，特朗普要求国会为伊朗战争提供数十亿美元
items.summary_zh: 但由于总统与本党的一些成员就这个问题发生争执，预算面临着一场艰苦的战斗。

items.title: Strategy's yield-generating STRC stock is more correlated with BTC than ever
items.summary: The tightening correlation undermines STRC's appeal as a relatively steadier income vehicle.
items.title_zh: Strategy 产生收益的 STRC 股票与 BTC 的相关性比以往任何时候都更高
items.summary_zh: 相关性的收紧削弱了 STRC 作为相对稳定的收入工具的吸引力。

items.title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
items.summary: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.
items.title_zh: Kraken 正在洽谈以 3.85 亿美元估值收购 DeFi 贷款机构 Aave 15% 的股份
items.summary_zh: 尽管 Aave 本身并未遭到黑客攻击，但 4 月份的 KelpDAO 漏洞引发了数十亿美元的存款外流，这家 DeFi 贷方正在重建。

items.title: Strategy has a 10-month cash runway for dividends, but retail investors are losing faith
items.summary: STRC was marketed as a low volatility income product designed to trade near $100, and its sharp decline has undermined investor trust.
items.title_zh: 该策略有 10 个月的股息现金跑道，但散户投资者正在失去信心
items.summary_zh: STRC 被宣传为低波动性收益产品，设计交易价格接近 100 美元，其大幅下跌削弱了投资者的信任。

items.title: Ark Invest buys more Coinbase, Circle, Bullish, Robinhood shares amid stock declines
items.summary: The same day, Wood noted that inflation is on its way down, pointing to rising productivity as a key disinflationary force.
items.title_zh: Ark Invest 在股价下跌之际买入更多 Coinbase、Circle、Bullish、Robinhood 股票
items.summary_zh: 同一天，伍德指出通胀正在下降，并指出生产率的提高是通货紧缩的关键力量。

items.title: Aave founder Stani Kulechov says AAVE isn’t for sale ‘at a 70% discount’ following report of Payward bid
items.summary: The Aave Will Win proposal redirected 100% of protocol and Aave-branded product revenue to the DAO and AAVE token holders.
items.title_zh: Aave 创始人 Stani Kulechov 表示，在 Payward 竞购报告后，AAVE 不会“以 70% 的折扣”出售
items.summary_zh: Aave Will Win 提案将 100% 的协议和 Aave 品牌产品收入重新分配给 DAO 和 AAVE 代币持有者。

items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.

items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
items.summary: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的 Base 区块链在网络中断两小时后恢复
items.summary_zh: 该事件暂时停止了以太坊最大的第 2 层网络之一的交易处理。

items.title: Quant fund says bitcoin is near a major inflection point as rare onchain signals align
items.summary: Hyperion Decimus' Chris Sullivan said four historically reliable indicators have aligned, leaving bitcoin one move away from confirming a major turning point.
items.title_zh: 量化基金表示，随着罕见的链上信号的一致，比特币正接近一个主要拐点
items.summary_zh: Hyperion Decimus 的 Chris Sullivan 表示，四个历史上可靠的指标已经一致，距离确认重大转折点仅一步之遥。

items.title: Bitcoin tumbles to new multi-year low of $58,000, but a short-squeeze setup emerges
items.summary: Derivatives markets signal that betting on further slide in prices is getting overcrowded, setting up for a potential snapback.
items.title_zh: 比特币跌至多年来新低 58,000 美元，但出现了空头挤压格局
items.summary_zh: 衍生品市场表明，押注价格进一步下跌的人已经过多，这为潜在的反弹做好了准备。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin: planning for inheritance
items.summary: Your bitcoin isn’t just an asset; it’s a future. Ensure your loved ones can access it with a solid inheritance plan for when you're no longer here.
items.title_zh: 顾问加密货币：比特币：继承规划
items.summary_zh: 您的比特币不仅仅是一种资产；更是一种资产。这是一个未来。当您离开这里时，确保您的亲人可以通过可靠的继承计划访问它。

items.title: Bitcoin briefly dips below $59,000 as macro pressures drag crypto, Asian equities lower
items.summary: Asian equities also fell sharply Friday morning, with South Korea's Kospi losing over 8% and triggering a circuit breaker.
items.title_zh: 由于宏观压力拖累加密货币，亚洲股市走低，比特币短暂跌破 59,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Asian equities also fell sharply Friday morning, with South Korea's Kospi losing over 8% and triggering a circuit breaker.

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title_zh: 混合模型可以更好地预测哪些标记？

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: We got local models to triage the OpenClaw repo for FREE!*
items.title_zh: 我们有本地模型免费对 OpenClaw 存储库进行分类！*

items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026

items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.

items.title: JPMorgan names Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh co-presidents as longtime exec Marianne Lake exits
items.summary: The moves would appear to make Doug Petno and Troy Rohrbaugh the most obvious possible successors to JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通任命 Doug Petno 和 Troy Rohrbaugh 为联席总裁，长期执行官 Marianne Lake 退出
items.summary_zh: 这些举措似乎将使道格·佩特诺和特洛伊·罗尔博成为摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙最明显的可能继任者。

items.title: Wendy's turns lower as meme rally fails to extend to a second day
items.summary: The stock's volatile run appeared largely disconnected from company fundamentals and instead reflected a burst of social media enthusiasm.
items.title_zh: 由于模因涨势未能延续到第二天，温迪的股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 该股的波动似乎很大程度上与公司基本面无关，而是反映了社交媒体热情的爆发。

items.title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
items.summary: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.
items.title_zh: 即使手头有人工智能工具，投资者仍然寻求人性化：汇丰银行
items.summary_zh: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.

items.title: Kalshi CEO says prediction market thinking about IPO, but not for this year
items.summary: Tarek Mansour said to CNBC's "Squawk Box" it made sense for the company at the stage to think about a debut on public markets.
items.title_zh: Kalshi首席执行官表示，预测市场正在考虑IPO，但今年不会
items.summary_zh: 塔里克·曼苏尔 (Tarek Mansour) 向 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”表示，公司现阶段考虑在公开市场上首次亮相是有意义的。

items.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars more than 25% with trading halted at one point
items.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.
items.title_zh: 新meme股票Wendy’s飙升逾25%，一度停牌
items.summary_zh: 虽然管理层变动会影响投资者情绪，但变动幅度之大表明可能还有其他因素在起作用。

items.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over prediction markets enforcement actions; first 'red state' to face such  lawsuit
items.summary: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.
items.title_zh: CFTC 就预测市场执法行动起诉肯塔基州；第一个面临此类诉讼的“红色州”
items.summary_zh: 该委员会现已起诉九个州，以捍卫其所认为的监管赛事合同的专有权利。

items.title: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
items.summary: At least 4,300 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震造成至少 235 人死亡，救援人员在废墟中搜寻幸存者
items.summary_zh: 两次相隔数秒的七级以上浅层地震已造成至少 4,300 人受伤。

items.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
items.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.
items.title_zh: 在充满不确定性的时期，地震对委内瑞拉造成毁灭性打击
items.summary_zh: 这两次地震发生在委内瑞拉时任领导人尼古拉斯·马杜罗被美军抓获后不到六个月。

items.title: People flee as building collapses on Caracas outskirts
items.summary: The capital and its surrounding areas have seen some of the worst damage from the 7.2 and 7.5 quakes, which hit a minute apart.
items.title_zh: 加拉加斯郊区建筑物倒塌，人们逃离
items.summary_zh: 首都及其周边地区在 7.2 级和 7.5 级地震中遭受了最严重的损失，两次地震的发生时间相隔一分钟。

items.title: Paris restricts alcohol consumption and sales as Europe's heatwave shifts east
items.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials bring in alcohol restrictions to ease pressure on hospitals.
items.title_zh: 随着欧洲热浪东移，巴黎限制酒类消费和销售
items.summary_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员则实施酒精限制措施以缓解医院压力。

items.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
items.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.
items.title_zh: 货船遇袭后联合国暂停霍尔木兹海峡疏散计划
items.summary_zh: 据报道，该船在阿曼附近被“不明弹丸”击中，但没有人员伤亡的报道。

items.title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
items.summary: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
items.title_zh: 法国指控强奸和性侵犯的妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效
items.summary_zh: 超过 50 名妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效，她们说诉讼时效阻碍了她们寻求正义。

items.title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
items.summary: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.
items.title_zh: 最高法院允许特朗普终止对海地和叙利亚移民的保护地位
items.summary_zh: 这项裁决为特朗普政府驱逐数十万在美国生活多年的移民开辟了道路。

items.title: Families lay flowers on barbed wire barricade on anniversary of deadly Kenya protests
items.summary: Protesters demand justice for the dozens killed during the 2024 demonstrations and last year's anniversary protests.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚致命抗议周年纪念日，家人在铁丝网路障上献花
items.summary_zh: 抗议者要求为 2024 年示威和去年周年抗议活动中丧生的数十人伸张正义。

items.title: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
items.summary: The airline had typically charged adults a fee of £8 each way to sit with their young children.
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空表示不会向坐在孩子旁边的父母收取费用
items.summary_zh: 该航空公司通常向成人收取单程 8 英镑的费用，以便与年幼的孩子坐在一起。

items.title: Search for Venezuela Quake Survivors Grows More Urgent
items.summary: Back-to-back earthquakes left at least 235 dead and injured more than 4,300 people, according to Venezuela’s government. Residents of the port city of La Guaira estimated that hundreds of people were trapped in rubble. The toll was expected to rise.
items.title_zh: 寻找委内瑞拉地震幸存者变得更加紧迫
items.summary_zh: 据委内瑞拉政府称，连续发生的地震造成至少 235 人死亡、4,300 多人受伤。港口城市拉瓜伊拉的居民估计有数百人被困在废墟中。预计死亡人数还会上升。

items.title: Deadly Heat Wave in Europe Continues to Smash Temperature Records
items.summary: The continent’s second heat wave since May continued to disrupt daily life for millions. Officials in Spain said it might have contributed to a spike in deaths.
items.title_zh: 欧洲致命热浪继续打破气温记录
items.summary_zh: 非洲大陆自五月以来的第二次热浪继续扰乱数百万人的日常生活。西班牙官员表示，这可能导致死亡人数激增。

items.title: Can a Youth Boom Survive South Sudan’s Education Crisis?
items.summary: South Sudan is the world’s newest nation and its education system is on the verge of collapse, putting an entire generation at risk.
items.title_zh: 青年繁荣能否渡过南苏丹的教育危机？
items.summary_zh: 南苏丹是世界上最新的国家，其教育系统正处于崩溃的边缘，使整整一代人面临风险。

items.title: Iraq’s New Leader Faces Resistance Trying to Bring Militias Under State Control
items.summary: The Trump administration has demanded that Iraqi leaders distance themselves from Iran and rein in Iran-linked militias that are outside of government control.
items.title_zh: 伊拉克新领导人试图将民兵置于国家控制之下面临阻力
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府要求伊拉克领导人与伊朗保持距离，并控制与伊朗有联系、不受政府控制的民兵组织。

items.title: Iran Strikes Ship in Strait of Hormuz, Undermining Efforts to Restore Traffic
items.summary: The attack, confirmed by U.S. and Iranian officials, came after Tehran threatened to disrupt shipping in the waterway and as Washington sought regional support for its peace agreement.
items.title_zh: 伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡袭击船只，破坏恢复交通的努力
items.summary_zh: 美国和伊朗官员证实了这次袭击事件，此前德黑兰威胁要扰乱该水道的航运，而华盛顿则为其和平协议寻求地区支持。

items.title: To Escape the Heat, Parisians Jump into an Old Industrial Canal
items.summary: Crowds are filling the Canal Saint-Martin in Paris, as temperatures soar above 100 degrees Fahrenheit. Forty people drowned while swimming in other waterways.
items.title_zh: 为了避暑，巴黎人跳入旧工业运河
items.summary_zh: 巴黎圣马丁运河上挤满了人群，气温飙升至 100 华氏度以上。四十人在其他水道游泳时溺水身亡。

items.title: King Charles III Has Paid More Than $39.6 Million in Taxes, Palace Discloses in a U.K. First
items.summary: Charles released his tax information for the period he has been king of Britain as part of a push for greater transparency after the scandal involving the former Prince Andrew.
items.title_zh: 皇宫在英国首次披露，查理三世国王已缴纳超过 3960 万美元的税款
items.summary_zh: 查尔斯公布了他担任英国国王期间的税务信息，作为在前安德鲁王子丑闻发生后推动提高透明度的一部分。

items.title: A Right-Wing Election Victory in Colombia, With a Little Help from Trump
items.summary: The U.S. president endorsed the right-wing winner. But his influence went further.
items.title_zh: 在特朗普的一点帮助下，右翼在哥伦比亚选举中获胜
items.summary_zh: 美国总统支持右翼获胜者。但他的影响力更进一步。

items.title: Officials Shut Down Kenya’s Capital to Block Protest
items.summary: The protest, an annual event, has become a showcase of the growing political power of Kenya’s youth.
items.title_zh: 官员关闭肯尼亚首都以阻止抗议活动
items.summary_zh: 这场一年一度的抗议活动已成为肯尼亚年轻人日益增长的政治力量的展示。

items.title: A Puppy-Abuse Case in China, Caught on Video, Prompts Rare Public Protest
items.summary: After a man was filmed torturing dogs, hundreds gathered in a rare demonstration that the police tried to break up. For many, the sit-in was their first civic action.
items.title_zh: 中国虐待小狗案被视频捕捉到，引发罕见的公众抗议
items.summary_zh: 一名男子被拍到虐待狗后，数百人聚集在一起举行罕见的示威活动，警方试图驱散。对于许多人来说，静坐是他们的第一次公民行动。

items.title: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market
items.summary: The $2.5 trillion asset manager deepens its blockchain push after taking over Superstate's tokenized money market fund as fund manager earlier this year.
items.title_zh: 资产管理巨头景顺 (Invesco) 申请针对稳定币储备市场的代币化基金
items.summary_zh: 今年早些时候，这家价值 2.5 万亿美元的资产管理公司接手 Superstate 的代币化货币市场基金作为基金管理公司后，深化了其区块链业务。

items.title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
items.summary: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.
items.title_zh: a16z 支持的加密货币公司重塑品牌，将重点转向解决人工智能的全球版权难题
items.summary_zh: 这家初创公司前身为 Story Protocol，筹集了 1.4 亿美元来确保互联网权利，目前正在为科技公司的数据同意、许可和来源建立审计层。

items.title: BitGo cuts 15% of staff to refocus on AI infrastructure and stablecoins
items.summary: BitGo CEO says the firm will now focus on key areas, including security, trading, stablecoins, settlement, and AI-powered infrastructure.
items.title_zh: BitGo 裁员 15%，重新专注于人工智能基础设施和稳定币
items.summary_zh: BitGo 首席执行官表示，公司现在将专注于关键领域，包括安全、交易、稳定币、结算和人工智能驱动的基础设施。

items.title: Senate races to advance crypto legislation in July as housing bill turmoil threatens timeline
items.summary: A sweeping cryptocurrency bill faces a narrowing path to passage as pressure grows on the Senate to take up the legislation next month.
items.title_zh: 由于住房法案动荡威胁到时间表，参议院将在 7 月份竞相推进加密货币立法
items.summary_zh: 随着参议院下个月审议该法案的压力越来越大，一项全面的加密货币法案的通过之路越来越窄。

items.title: Trillion-dollar asset manager Invesco looks to plant a flag in tokenized stablecoin reserve sector
items.summary: The fund will invest primarily in U.S. Treasuries, repo agreements, and cash equivalents to maintain a stable $1 net asset value.
items.title_zh: 万亿美元资产管理公司景顺（Invesco）希望在代币化稳定币储备领域插上一面旗帜
items.summary_zh: 该基金将主要投资于美国国债、回购协议和现金等价物，以维持稳定的 1 美元净资产值。

items.title: Multicoin predicts HYPE hits $319 by 2028 as Hyperliquid turns into an ‘everything exchange’
items.summary: According to the investment firm, Hyperliquid's user base grew from roughly 300,000 to 923,000 during 2025.
items.title_zh: Multicoin 预测，随着 Hyperliquid 转变为“万能交易所”，HYPE 到 2028 年将达到 319 美元
items.summary_zh: 据该投资公司称，Hyperliquid 的用户群在 2025 年从大约 300,000 人增长到 923,000 人。

items.title: Coinbase-incubated Base suffers mainnet chain stall interrupting block production
items.summary: Deposits and withdrawals have also been affected, while transactions are delayed or stalled, according to Base's status page.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 孵化的 Base 主网链停滞，区块生产中断
items.summary_zh: Deposits and withdrawals have also been affected, while transactions are delayed or stalled, according to Base's status page.

items.title: Sophon sunsets its Layer 2 blockchain, moves to Base to build consumer apps
items.summary: Sophon, which has raised $70 million in total funding, is shutting down its Layer 2 blockchain and moving to Base to build consumer apps.
items.title_zh: Sophon 放弃其第 2 层区块链，转向 Base 构建消费者应用程序
items.summary_zh: Sophon, which has raised $70 million in total funding, is shutting down its Layer 2 blockchain and moving to Base to build consumer apps.

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
items.title_zh: 修补地球：支持开源维护者的黎明计划
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 Patch the Planet，这是一项 Daybreak 计划，可帮助开源维护人员通过人工智能和专家评审来查找、验证和修复漏洞。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
items.title_zh: Daybreak：保护世界上每个组织的工具
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了新的 Daybreak 工具，包括 Codex Security 和 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以帮助组织大规模查找、验证和修补漏洞。

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.
items.title_zh: Codex-maxxing 适用于长时间运行的工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 Jason Liu 如何使用 Codex 保存上下文、管理复杂项目以及帮助工作在单一提示之外继续进行。

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
items.title_zh: 三星电子为员工带来 ChatGPT 和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
items.title_zh: 使用 CUGA 构建真正的代理应用程序：轻量级工具上的两打工作示例

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨源存储 API

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary_zh: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.title_zh: 参加我们的 I/O 2026 测验，在 Google AI Studio 中进行编码。
items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni 和 Gemini 3.5 的 9 个实际演示
items.summary_zh: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
items.summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
items.title_zh: 查看 Futures Lab 中的真实 AI 原型。
items.summary_zh: 滑铁卢大学的学生开发了像手语导师这样的人工智能原型，以重塑教育和工作的未来。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。

items.title: MIT in the media: For the future of tech, "Massachusetts can absolutely lead"

items.title: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary: A new spatial memory system for robots efficiently captures details about the objects they see while exploring their environment.
items.title_zh: Could AI tell you where you left your keys?
items.summary_zh: 一种新的机器人空间记忆系统可以有效地捕捉它们在探索环境时看到的物体的细节。
